creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hello Wojciech, 

could you please send a small paragraph, which I can include into our list? 
And please also tell me in your reply, in which category do you want to 
be listed? As you can notice, we have vendors in more categories separated, 
e.g. ISP, Software, Consult, etc. 

Regards, 
Gabor
